category: Standard Amenities Found Inside a Hotel Room
explanation: Bed, Television, Mini-fridge, and Coffee Maker are all common items typically found within the private confines of a standard hotel room. A Swimming Pool is a hotel amenity, but it is located in a communal area or outside the building, not inside an individual room.

category: The Four Great Inventions of Ancient China
explanation: Gunpowder, Compass, Papermaking, and the Printing Press are traditionally recognized as the 'Four Great Inventions of Ancient China'. The Steam Engine, conversely, was a pivotal invention of the European Industrial Revolution.

All tokens except 'HOUSE' spell a different, common English word when read backward. REWARD (DRAWER), LIVE (EVIL), LOOP (POOL), STOP (POTS). HOUSE (ESUOH) does not form a common English word when reversed.
